presets.title: Principianta — Descoberta del moviment
presets.description: Generator-mode introductory block for women with no prior training history. Very conservative distribution, mobility and stability emphasis, and very slow progression. Ideal as a first 4–6 week program.
presets.notes: Designed as a first contact with structured training; may help build movement confidence and body awareness before progressing to loaded exercises.

presets.title: Principianta — Força base (iniciació)
presets.description: Faithful-mode foundational strength block for women with no prior training history. 2 sessions/week, all beginner exercises, body-weight or light resistance only. 6–8 week recommended duration.
presets.notes: Introductory full-body strength block; focuses on technique and movement patterns before progression. Increase load only when form is consistently correct.

presets.title: Principianta — Força progressiva (2a etapa)
presets.description: Faithful-mode intermediate progression for women who have completed a foundational block. 3 sessions/week with light dumbbells, undulating periodization. Recommended after 6+ weeks of the introductory block.
presets.notes: Second-stage block that may help consolidate movement patterns and introduce progressive overload; recommended after completing a foundations block.

principianta_descoberta_v1.name: Principianta — Descoberta del moviment
principianta_descoberta_v1.description: Bloc introductori en mode generador per a dones sense historial esportiu previ. Distribució molt conservadora, èmfasi en mobilitat i estabilitat. Ideal com a primer programa de 4–6 setmanes.

principianta_forca_base_v1.name: Principianta — Força base (iniciació)
principianta_forca_base_v1.description: Bloc fidel de força fonamental per a principiantes. 2 sessions/setmana, exercicis bàsics amb pes corporal o resistència mínima. Prioritza tècnica i aprenentatge del patró de moviment.

principianta_forca_progressiva_v1.name: Principianta — Força progressiva (2a etapa)
principianta_forca_progressiva_v1.description: Bloc fidel de progressió per a dones que han completat el bloc de bases. 3 sessions/setmana amb manuelles lleugeres, periodització ondulant. Recomanat a partir de les 6+ setmanes del bloc introductori.

principianta_descoberta_v1.name: Principiante — Descubrimiento del movimiento
principianta_descoberta_v1.description: Bloque introductorio en modo generador para mujeres sin historial deportivo previo. Distribución muy conservadora, énfasis en movilidad y estabilidad. Ideal como primer programa de 4–6 semanas.

principianta_forca_base_v1.name: Principiante — Fuerza base (iniciación)
principianta_forca_base_v1.description: Bloque fiel de fuerza fundamental para principiantes. 2 sesiones/semana, ejercicios básicos con peso corporal o resistencia mínima. Prioriza técnica y aprendizaje del patrón de movimiento.

principianta_forca_progressiva_v1.name: Principiante — Fuerza progresiva (2a etapa)
principianta_forca_progressiva_v1.description: Bloque fiel de progresión para mujeres que han completado el bloque de bases. 3 sesiones/semana con mancuernas ligeras, periodización ondulante. Recomendado a partir de las 6+ semanas del bloque introductorio.

principianta_descoberta_v1.name: Beginner — Movement discovery
principianta_descoberta_v1.description: Generator-mode introductory block for women with no prior training history. Very conservative distribution, mobility and stability emphasis. Ideal as a first 4–6 week program.

principianta_forca_base_v1.name: Beginner — Foundation strength
principianta_forca_base_v1.description: Faithful-mode foundational strength block for beginners. 2 sessions/week, basic body-weight or light resistance exercises. Prioritizes technique and movement pattern learning.

principianta_forca_progressiva_v1.name: Beginner — Progressive strength (stage 2)
principianta_forca_progressiva_v1.description: Faithful-mode progression block for women who have completed a foundations block. 3 sessions/week with light dumbbells, undulating periodization. Recommended after 6+ weeks of the introductory block.
